betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Electric Press§f

§aAn electrically powered upgrade to the burner press — faster and cleaner.§f

The §bElectric Press§f works identically to the burner press but runs on electricity, operates faster, and maintains consistent speed without warm-up. It is crafted in the §bAssembly Machine§f.

§6Crafting§f:
Requires steel plates, rubber bars, hydraulic pistons, and an integrated circuit board.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Plates, wires, circuits§f — same stamps as burner press
§b• Powder compacting§f: flat stamp re-solidifies powders (diamond, emerald, lapis, coal)

§eTip§f: The conveyor press is a further upgrade — belt-fed automation with no GUI.
